decisions.summary: Fix review blocker: guard the ConversationPanel HTTP messages query so an in-flight fetch cannot overwrite newer WebSocket-streamed state. Use a ref tracking the latest streaming state and, when it is true at queryFn resolution, return the existing cache value (or empty fallback) instead of the stale HTTP response.

Merging origin/main into feature/pan-1642 introduced a tracked .pan/continue.json from PAN-1788 that overwrote the workspace continue file. Restored the PAN-1642 workspace continue file after the merge commit.

Post-merge ChatMarkdown Streamdown test was flaky because the lazy Streamdown renderer can render a ReactMarkdown fallback before the lazy chunk loads; made the Streamdown assertions async with waitFor so they resolve after the renderer loads.

hazards.summary: Returning empty messages/workLog when streaming is active but the cache is still empty could briefly flash an empty state before the WS initial snapshot arrives.
hazards.mitigation: The stream hook already sets discovering=true on first connect; downstream UI treats streamMessagesEnabled + empty as discovering/loading. The fallback is only used for in-flight HTTP races, not the steady state.

hazards.summary: .pan/continue.json appears to be tracked on origin/main (PAN-1788 workspace copy), so future merges may clobber the PAN-1642 workspace continue file again.
hazards.mitigation: Restore the PAN-1642 continue file immediately after any merge that touches it; consider untracking .pan/continue.json on main if it is indeed tracked.

resumePoint.description: Merge from origin/main committed, all quality gates pass. Push to origin/feature/pan-1642 and call pan done PAN-1642.

sessionHistory.note: Resumed PAN-1642 to address unaddressed review feedback (stale HTTP fetch overwriting WS stream cache) and verification test failures. Workspace .pan/continue.json was missing; recreated from project-side continue state.

Implemented the review fix in ConversationPanel.tsx. pan done then required a merge from origin/main; resolved conflicts in ConversationPanel.tsx, MessagesTimeline.test.tsx, and took origin/main for three unrelated context-overflow test files. Post-merge, fixed a flaky Streamdown assertion in ChatMarkdown.test.tsx by awaiting/waitFor the lazy-loaded renderer. Final gate: typecheck pass, lint pass, root tests pass (6003), frontend tests pass (1537).

Fixed review blocker: guarded ConversationPanel HTTP messages query so in-flight fetches cannot overwrite newer WS-streamed state. Merged origin/main to resolve rebase; fixed post-merge Streamdown test flakiness in ChatMarkdown.test.tsx. Typecheck, lint, root tests (6003), and frontend tests (1537) all pass.
